releaseNotes: Added full multi-renderer support with Canvas fallback, Direct2D, OpenGL and Vulkan renderers.
Added renderer selection at the top of Preferences and automatic renderer setting save support.
Added a viewport renderer badge showing the active renderer.
Added real-time render ms updates for Canvas, Direct2D, OpenGL and Vulkan.
Added automatic update check on startup.
Added Ctrl+A support to select all stadium objects.
Added Anonymous Usage Analytics preference under Preferences > Privacy.
Added Text to Segments tool with uppercase and lowercase text support.
Added click-and-drag placement system for generated text.
Added Insert Shape tool with Basic, Symbols and Objects categories.
Added many preset segment shapes such as stars, hearts, arrows, shields, crowns, trophies, icons and decorative objects.
Added Import Image as Segments (BETA) for converting PNG, JPG and BMP image outlines into HaxBall segments.
Added automatic outline simplification and HaxBall vertex/segment limit protection for image imports.
Added Move tool next to Select in the toolbar for directly dragging selected objects.
Added Ctrl+Shift+M hotkey for the Move tool.
Improved Preferences layout and modern HaxStudio-themed dialogs.
Improved viewport consistency across Canvas, Direct2D, OpenGL and Vulkan.
Improved live object dragging responsiveness and large-map editing performance.
Improved Text to Segments lowercase glyphs, placement preview and status bar hints.
Improved Insert Shape placement workflow and preview behavior.
Improved image outline simplification and straight-edge cleanup for imported images.
Improved generated and imported decorative objects so they are no-collision by default.
Fixed Direct2D and OpenGL curved segment hitbox issues.
Fixed Direct2D and OpenGL endpoint/vertex drag responsiveness.
Fixed Canvas selection rectangle closing by itself.
Fixed OpenGL selection, drag, rotate and curve editing issues.
Fixed Vulkan curve drawing and curve handle button behavior.
Fixed bulk color application for selected objects.
Fixed multi-select segment color editing and manual color apply with Enter.
Fixed Mirror Tool dark theme styling and single/triple mirror behavior.
Fixed Text to Segments glyph issues including lowercase m and p.
Fixed Image Import compile issues, background detection issues and over-detailed vertex/segment output.
Renamed Export Options to Export Stadium.
Updated HaxStudio UI version labels to 1.4.0.
